arts.ttl: Lyon predicted XI v FCSB: Rayan Cherki and Georges Mikautadze to return to line-up
arts.sum: Olympique Lyonnais have a clean bill of health as they welcome FCSB to the Groupama Stadium this evening, looking to preserve their 3-1 lead from the first leg and qualify…
